system_content.task: evaluate the role of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the research paper based on the title and abstract.

properties.ai_necessity_list: The ai_necessity_list input field defines two elements: 'indispensable', meaning the research objective is practically impossible or computationally infeasible without AI using traditional methods, and 'enhancement', meaning traditional methods exist and work but AI improves their efficiency, speed, or accuracy
properties.ai_usage_level_list: The ai_usage_level_list input field defines two elements: 'partially_based', meaning AI is applied to a specific component or step within a larger traditional methodology, and 'fully_based', meaning the core methodology or solution framework is fundamentally built upon AI/ML architectures

heads.head: Analyze the paper to determine the dependency on AI. Strictly return the result only in JSON format (without any other text) with the following fields

properties.ai_necessity_reason: The research aims to generate novel protein sequences with specific functional properties, a task that requires exploring a vast combinatorial space and learning complex relationships, which is infeasible with traditional biophysical modeling or manual design.
properties.ai_usage_level_reason: The core methodology and primary innovation of the research is an end-to-end deep generative model; the solution framework is fundamentally built upon AI architectures.

properties.ai_necessity_reason: The overall robotic navigation system is based on traditional control theory and could function effectively using conventional filters and methods.
properties.ai_usage_level_reason: AI (a CNN) is applied only to accelerate a specific sub-step—noise filtering in sensor data—within the larger, traditional methodology framework.
